codeReview.summary: The fix closes both follow-up scrutiny blockers on per-share onboard dispatch. `encodeDistributionPackage` now clears stale `pendingDispatchRequestId` before dispatch, stores a new request id only from a successful onboard dispatch, and surfaces dispatch throws via `adoptionError`. The multi-device regression spec also now drives the real requester `/onboard` UI in the happy path while retaining the documented DEV-hook failure-path deviation.

summary: Pass. The stale request-id correlation bug and the requester-side UI bypass identified in round 1 are both resolved at current HEAD.
